all.en: Our agency completed a full technical and content audit of the corporate website.
all.zh: 我們的代理商完成了企業網站的完整技術與內容體檢。

all.en: The audit covered nine hundred unique URLs across all language versions.
all.zh: 本次體檢涵蓋了所有語系共九百個獨立網址。

all.en: Overall site health was rated at sixty eight out of one hundred.
all.zh: 整體站點健康度評為一百分中的六十八分。

all.en: The score reflects solid fundamentals but several high impact issues remain.
all.zh: 此分數反映基礎良好但仍存在數項高影響問題。

all.en: Forty two pages currently return server errors that block indexing.
all.zh: 目前有四十二個頁面回傳伺服器錯誤致使無法被索引。

all.en: More than one hundred pages have missing or duplicated meta descriptions.
all.zh: 超過一百個頁面有遺漏或重複的中繼描述。

all.en: Title tags on product pages often exceed the recommended sixty character limit.
all.zh: 產品頁的標題標籤經常超過建議的六十字元上限。

all.en: Image alt text is absent on roughly thirty percent of all visual assets.
all.zh: 約百分之三十的視覺素材缺少圖片替代文字。

all.en: Page load speed on mobile averages four point one seconds for our top pages.
all.zh: 我們主要頁面在行動裝置上的平均載入時間為四點一秒。

all.en: Core web vitals scores fall below the recommended threshold on three key templates.
all.zh: 三項關鍵版型的核心網頁指標分數低於建議門檻。

all.en: Several blog articles contain broken internal links to discontinued products.
all.zh: 數篇部落格文章含有指向已下架產品的失效內部連結。

all.en: The XML sitemap still references old URLs from the previous site structure.
all.zh: XML 網站地圖仍引用舊版站點結構的舊網址。

all.en: Hreflang tags are missing on about half of the multilingual pages.
all.zh: 約一半的多語頁面缺少 hreflang 標記。

all.en: Schema markup is implemented only on a small portion of product detail pages.
all.zh: 結構化資料僅實作於一小部分產品詳細頁。

all.en: Backlink profile remains healthy with two thousand referring domains overall.
all.zh: 外部連結組合維持健康，總計兩千個參照網域。

all.en: However, twelve toxic links from low quality sites should be disavowed promptly.
all.zh: 然而有十二個來自低品質站點的有害連結應儘速否認。

all.en: Keyword rankings improved in twenty eight tracked terms over the past quarter.
all.zh: 追蹤的二十八個關鍵字排名於過去一季有所提升。

all.en: Eleven keywords slipped out of the top ten and require fresh content support.
all.zh: 十一個關鍵字跌出前十名需新內容支援。

all.en: Recommended quick wins include fixing redirects and updating meta descriptions.
all.zh: 建議的速勝項目包含修復轉址與更新中繼描述。

all.en: Medium term actions involve content refresh on twenty top performing articles.
all.zh: 中期行動涉及更新二十篇表現頂尖文章的內容。

all.en: Long term strategy should focus on building topic clusters around solution pages.
all.zh: 長期策略應聚焦於圍繞解決方案頁建立主題集群。

all.en: A re audit is recommended six months after implementation begins.
all.zh: 建議於改善實施開始六個月後進行再次體檢。

all.en: The full report with prioritized action items is attached for your review.
all.zh: 含優先排序行動項目的完整報告隨附供您審閱。

all.en: Please confirm your team availability for the implementation kickoff next week.
all.zh: 請確認貴團隊下週實施啟動會議的可出席時間。

all.en: Our consultants will lead a workshop to walk through each priority item.
all.zh: 我們的顧問將主持工作坊，逐項講解每個優先項目。

all.en: Developers should receive the technical fix list at least two days beforehand.
all.zh: 開發人員應至少在兩天前收到技術修正清單。

all.en: We can provide sample code snippets for the schema markup implementation.
all.zh: 我們可提供結構化資料實作的範例程式碼片段。

all.en: Editorial guidelines for the content refresh will be shared by Friday.
all.zh: 內容更新的編輯準則將於週五前分享給各位。

all.en: A shared dashboard will track weekly progress against the agreed milestones.
all.zh: 共用儀表板將依約定里程碑每週追蹤進度。

all.en: Stakeholders will receive a brief status email every other Monday morning.
all.zh: 利害關係人將於每隔週的週一上午收到簡短狀態郵件。

all.en: Performance benchmarks should be captured before changes go live.
all.zh: 應在變更上線前記錄效能基準值。

all.en: We expect organic traffic to begin recovering within six to ten weeks.
all.zh: 我們預期自然流量將於六至十週內開始回升。

all.en: Budget allocation for additional content production has been confirmed by finance.
all.zh: 新增內容製作的預算配置已獲財務確認。

all.en: Feel free to forward this report to your regional marketing leads.
all.zh: 歡迎將本報告轉發給您區域的行銷負責人。
